header: # Rabbit Workflow — feature-oriented, subagent-driven, drift-protected. The .claude folder is scope-guarded: every feature write requires an active scope marker. Use /rabbit-feature-touch for any feature change — it runs a full TDD cycle (spec → test-green). TDD is token-heavy; skip it only for trivial edits via the one-time or session override.
deprecation_criterion: when the project identity line changes or is superseded
